basic_details.job_title: Punjab & Sind Bank Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab & Sind Bank Recruitment 2026: Punjab & Sind Bank has released the official notification for Medical Consultant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. in general medicine recognized by Medical Council of India with at least 05 years of experience after passing M.D. OR M.B.B.S/ BHMS having at least 07 years of experience after passing M.B.B.S/ BHMS as a registered Medical Practitioner. Preference to M.D. qualification or doctors empanelled with PSU/Banks.
qualification.details: M.D. in general medicine recognized by Medical Council of India with at least 05 years of experience after passing M.D. OR M.B.B.S/ BHMS having at least 07 years of experience after passing M.B.B.S/ BHMS as a registered Medical Practitioner. Preference to M.D. qualification or doctors empanelled with PSU/Banks.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Shortlisting Interview Final Selection based on Interview Marks
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Punjab & Sind Bank Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: punjabandsind.bank.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Punjab & Sind Bank Medical Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Punjab & Sind Bank Medical Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Punjab & Sind Bank Medical Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Punjab & Sind Bank Medical Consultant position is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Medical Consultant post?
faq.answer: The Medical Consultant will be paid Rs. 800 per hour for their services as per the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.D. in general medicine with 5 years of experience or M.B.B.S/BHMS with 7 years of experience as a registered medical practitioner.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Punjab & Sind Bank Medical Consultant job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Medical Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, shortlisting, and an interview. Final selection is based on interview marks.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Medical Consultant be posted?
faq.answer: The Medical Consultant position is for Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, with a pincode of 171001.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Punjab & Sind Bank Medical Consultant position is a contractual job opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations for this post.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply online for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Online applications will not be accepted.
